summary: Comprehensive E2E testing completed for SuruAhai marketplace MVP. All core functionalities working correctly including landing page, user/mitra registration, admin login, and all dashboard functionalities.

resolved_issues.fix_applied: Reordered routes to place specific /api/mitra/dashboard before parameterized route

passed_tests: Landing page loads with navbar, hero section, services, how it works sections
User registration flow - successfully creates USER account and redirects to dashboard
Admin login with admin@suruahai.com / admin123 works correctly
User dashboard displays services, categories, search functionality
Mitra registration flow - successfully creates MITRA account
Mitra dashboard displays with stats (orders, earnings, rating, online toggle)
Admin dashboard shows GMV, users, mitras statistics and management features
Backend API test suite: 12/12 tests passed (100% success rate)
Authentication and authorization working across all user roles
Database integration working properly with MongoDB
Responsive design working on desktop viewport
